=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (5:3-5:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D2] (11:3-11:17) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D3] (17:71-17:85) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D4] (22:39-22:53) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

[D5] (25:38-25:52) TS377100: `Effect.map` expresses this success-value transformation more directly than `Effect.flatMap` followed by `Effect.succeed`. effect(flatMapToMap)
  Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/flatMapToMap.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

// Should trigger: pipeable style
export const shouldTriggerPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.map((n) => n + 1)
)

// Should trigger: pipe style with a block body
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipeable style with a function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpression = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.flatMap(function(n) {
  return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
}))

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.flatMap(Effect.succeed(1), (n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))

// Should trigger: data-last style
export const shouldTriggerDataLast = Effect.flatMap((n: number) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))(Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger: callback returns another Effect operation
export const shouldNotTriggerEffect = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.log(n))
)

// Should NOT trigger: callback contains additional logic
export const shouldNotTriggerLogic = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    console.log(n)
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: unrelated flatMap and succeed functions
const unrelated = {
  flatMap: <A, B>(value: A, f: (value: A) => B): B => f(value),
  succeed: <A>(value: A): A => value
}
export const shouldNotTriggerUnrelated = unrelated.flatMap(1, (n) => unrelated.succeed(n + 1))


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/flatMapToMap.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

// Should trigger: pipeable style
export const shouldTriggerPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))
)

// Should trigger: pipe style with a block body
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.map((n) => {
    return n + 1
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipeable style with a function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpression = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.flatMap(function(n) {
  return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
}))

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.flatMap(Effect.succeed(1), (n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))

// Should trigger: data-last style
export const shouldTriggerDataLast = Effect.flatMap((n: number) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))(Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger: callback returns another Effect operation
export const shouldNotTriggerEffect = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.log(n))
)

// Should NOT trigger: callback contains additional logic
export const shouldNotTriggerLogic = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    console.log(n)
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: unrelated flatMap and succeed functions
const unrelated = {
  flatMap: <A, B>(value: A, f: (value: A) => B): B => f(value),
  succeed: <A>(value: A): A => value
}
export const shouldNotTriggerUnrelated = unrelated.flatMap(1, (n) => unrelated.succeed(n + 1))


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/flatMapToMap.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

// Should trigger: pipeable style
export const shouldTriggerPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))
)

// Should trigger: pipe style with a block body
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipeable style with a function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpression = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.map(function(n) {
  return n + 1
}))

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.flatMap(Effect.succeed(1), (n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))

// Should trigger: data-last style
export const shouldTriggerDataLast = Effect.flatMap((n: number) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))(Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger: callback returns another Effect operation
export const shouldNotTriggerEffect = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.log(n))
)

// Should NOT trigger: callback contains additional logic
export const shouldNotTriggerLogic = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    console.log(n)
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: unrelated flatMap and succeed functions
const unrelated = {
  flatMap: <A, B>(value: A, f: (value: A) => B): B => f(value),
  succeed: <A>(value: A): A => value
}
export const shouldNotTriggerUnrelated = unrelated.flatMap(1, (n) => unrelated.succeed(n + 1))


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/flatMapToMap.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

// Should trigger: pipeable style
export const shouldTriggerPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))
)

// Should trigger: pipe style with a block body
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipeable style with a function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpression = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.flatMap(function(n) {
  return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
}))

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.map(Effect.succeed(1), (n) => n + 1)

// Should trigger: data-last style
export const shouldTriggerDataLast = Effect.flatMap((n: number) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))(Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger: callback returns another Effect operation
export const shouldNotTriggerEffect = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.log(n))
)

// Should NOT trigger: callback contains additional logic
export const shouldNotTriggerLogic = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    console.log(n)
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: unrelated flatMap and succeed functions
const unrelated = {
  flatMap: <A, B>(value: A, f: (value: A) => B): B => f(value),
  succeed: <A>(value: A): A => value
}
export const shouldNotTriggerUnrelated = unrelated.flatMap(1, (n) => unrelated.succeed(n + 1))


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable flatMapToMap for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable flatMapToMap for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.map" ===

--- file:///.src/flatMapToMap.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

// Should trigger: pipeable style
export const shouldTriggerPipeable = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))
)

// Should trigger: pipe style with a block body
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.succeed(1),
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should trigger: pipeable style with a function expression
export const shouldTriggerFunctionExpression = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(Effect.flatMap(function(n) {
  return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
}))

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.flatMap(Effect.succeed(1), (n) => Effect.succeed(n + 1))

// Should trigger: data-last style
export const shouldTriggerDataLast = Effect.map((n: number) => n + 1)(Effect.succeed(1))

// Should NOT trigger: callback returns another Effect operation
export const shouldNotTriggerEffect = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => Effect.log(n))
)

// Should NOT trigger: callback contains additional logic
export const shouldNotTriggerLogic = Effect.succeed(1).pipe(
  Effect.flatMap((n) => {
    console.log(n)
    return Effect.succeed(n + 1)
  })
)

// Should NOT trigger: unrelated flatMap and succeed functions
const unrelated = {
  flatMap: <A, B>(value: A, f: (value: A) => B): B => f(value),
  succeed: <A>(value: A): A => value
}
export const shouldNotTriggerUnrelated = unrelated.flatMap(1, (n) => unrelated.succeed(n + 1))
